job_posting:
Product Manager — Northwind Analytics Pvt. Ltd. (Hyderabad, Telangana; hybrid)

Northwind Analytics is hiring a Product Manager to own the roadmap for our data platform. The PM will partner with engineering, design, and customers to define and ship features that matter.

Responsibilities: own product discovery and delivery, write specs, prioritise the backlog, partner cross-functionally.
Requirements: demonstrated product-management experience; strong written and verbal communication; experience with B2B SaaS analytics is a plus. We evaluate candidates strictly on job-related competencies and provide reasonable accommodations as required throughout the process.

Northwind is an equal-opportunity employer. We welcome applications from people of every background and gender identity, and we evaluate every candidate solely on the merits of their work and demonstrated skills for this role.

Compensation: ₹28,00,000 – ₹38,00,000 per annum (CTC) plus ESOPs, comprehensive health cover for self and family, Provident Fund, gratuity, 24 days of paid leave, and a hybrid work policy.
